session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8842 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the specified PR argument.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll execute the skill by running the `erk exec get-pr-feedback` command with the specified PR number:
session.tool_result:

[View workflow run](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/actions/runs/22770335830)", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8842#issuecomment-4012469364" }, { "id": 4012565127, "author": "github-actions[bot]", "body": "<!-- audit-pr-docs -->

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-06 20:33:27 PT

Found 1 violation across 1 file. Inline comment posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ Verbatim code blocks — None found (previous violations addressed)
❌ Inaccurate claims — Found in docs/learned/architecture/git-plumbing-patterns.md:89
✅ Duplicative sections — None found
✅ Drift risk — None found

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/architecture/git-plumbing-patterns.md:89`: Inaccurate description of index sync — claims `git checkout HEAD --` via `run_subprocess_with_context()`, but actual code writes files to disk and stages via `stage_files()`

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/git-graphite-quirks.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/architecture/git-plumbing-patterns.md`: 1 violation
- `docs/learned/architecture/rebase-conflict-patterns.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/capabilities/bundled-skills.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/workflow-run-list.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/commands/optimization-patterns.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/pr-operations/commit-message-generation.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/pr-operations/plan-embedding-in-pr.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/pr-operations/pr-submit-phases.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/tripwires-index.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/tui/architecture.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/tui/modal-screen-pattern.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/tui/tripwires.md`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-06 20:33:27 PT**: Audited 14 docs: 1 inaccuracy in git-plumbing-patterns.md (index sync description claims git checkout HEAD -- / run_subprocess_with_context but actual code uses write_text + stage_files)

</details>", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8842#issuecomment-4012565127" }, { "id": 4015011957, "author": "github-actions[bot]", "body": "<!-- erk:pr-address-run -->
## PR Review Comments Addressed

This PR was updated by an automated process triggered by:
```
erk pr address-remote 8842
```

### What is this?

[Erk](https://github.com/schrockn/erk) is a CLI tool for plan-oriented agentic
engineering. The `pr-address` workflow uses Claude to read PR review comments
and address them automatically.

### Changes Made

The documentation was updated to remove a reference to a specific internal helper function and instead direct readers to the actual implementation location. This change makes the documentation less dependent on specific function names and more focused on the conceptual approach—checking whether Graphite is enabled to determine the rebase strategy—while pointing readers to the authoritative source code for implementation details.

### Details

- **Model:** claude-opus-4-6
- **Workflow run:** [View details](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/actions/runs/22791991222)
- **Commits added:** 1

---
